productDisplayName: Asics Women Gel Cushioning Silver Blue Active Running Shoe
description: CompositionSilver and blue synthetic leather running shoes with synthetic leather and mesh upper, rearfoot GEL cushioning system, lightweight midsole, trusstic sole unit and solid rubber outsole with AHARWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drier Avoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in sunlightFittingRegularrunning becomes all the more pleasurable in these sturdy lightweight trainers from asics. The mesh and synthetic leather upper ensures your feet breathe while the lightweight midsole attenuates shock throughout the gait cycle. The rearfoot GEL Cushioning system attenuates shock during impact phase and allows for a smooth transition to midstance. The sole unit is kept light with the trusstic system, without compromising on the shoe&rsquo s structure. The solid rubber outsole with AHAR enhances durability and traction making running an absolute pleasure.
